articles.title: SpaceX awarded $6.45B in Space Force contracts ahead of IPO
articles.description: SpaceX already generated one-fifth of its 2025 revenue from government contracts, the company revealed in its IPO filing.
articles.author: Sean O'Kane

articles.title: Coders are refusing to work without AI — and that could come back to bite them
articles.description: While AI is helping coders produce code faster, it may not be producing better code, researchers warn. And that could cause problems down the road
articles.author: Julie Bort

articles.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
articles.description: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases
articles.author: Natasha Lomas, Romain Dillet, Kyle Wiggers, Lucas Ropek

articles.title: What happens when companies become too AI-pilled?
articles.description: The people deciding that AI can replace your job are also the ones least likely to understand what your job truly involves, according to Box founder
articles.author: Theresa Loconsolo

articles.title: After Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire, AI chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M
articles.description: Chipmaker Groq is looking to raise $650 million in internal funding as it pivots from hardware to focus more on AI inference, the process of refining
articles.author: Dominic-Madori Davis

articles.title: Microsoft under fire for threatening security researcher with criminal investigation
articles.description: A public spat between Microsoft and an independent security researcher reopens a long-running debate over who is responsible for securing software.
articles.author: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai

articles.title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
articles.description: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human
articles.author: Julie Bort

articles.title: Kiwibit’s AI-powered bird feeder is my new backyard buddy
articles.description: If you're looking for a fun way to connect with nature while collecting bird species on an app like Pokémon, give this smart feeder a try.

articles.title: This chip startup just raised $135M on a bet that AI’s biggest bottleneck isn’t compute — it’s memory
articles.description: South Korean chip startup XCENA is betting that AI's real bottleneck is not compute, but memory.

articles.title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket explodes during testing in Florida
articles.description: The explosion is likely a major setback for Jeff Bezos' spaceflight company, and its attempt to compete with SpaceX.

articles.title: Glean’s top line crosses $300M as AI budget-cutting becomes its major selling point
articles.description: The enterprise AI search startup tripled its annual revenue even as tech giants entered the category.

articles.title: Waymo dominates autonomous vehicle registrations as Tesla trails behind
articles.description: A new law and AV tracker tool gives the clearest accounting yet of how many robotaxis and self-driving trucks are in Texas.
